question: Which year from 2011-2016 has the highest total passenger count across Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) terminals? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: An airport operations analyst wants to identify the busiest year at LAX in the early 2010s.

1.fact: Summing Passenger_Count by year (from ReportPeriod) across all terminals and categories for 2011-2016, the highest total is 2016 with 80921651 passengers.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2011-2016 has the highest total passenger count across Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) terminals? (Convert ReportPeriod to Year; sum Passenger_Count by Year; select the maximum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which year from 2011-2016 has the highest total passenger count? (Convert ReportPeriod to Year; sum Passenger_Count by Year; select the maximum.) The answer is 2016.
